headline: The Iran war will change global energy markets in these important ways, oil executives say
summary: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has resulted in the loss of nearly a billion barrels of oil with the shortage growing worse every day.

headline: JD Vance Meets Qatar PM In Washington To Discuss Iran: Report
summary: U.S. Vice President JD Vance is reportedly meeting Qatar's Prime Minister to discuss Iran negotiations, energy markets and regional stability amid fragile ceasefire conditions.

headline: Argus Sees Stronger Production Growth Ahead for Exxon Mobil (XOM)
summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) is included among the 10 Best Inflation-Hedge Stocks to Buy for 2026. On May 7, Argus analyst Bill Selesky raised the firm’s price recommendation on Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) to $169 from $166. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The firm pointed to Exxon’s Q1 earnings beat, while noting […]
